name: Bobcat Goldthwait
blurb: He rose to prominence in the 1980s through specials like An Evening with Bobcat Goldthwait: Share the Warmth and supporting roles in the Police Academy films, later building a respected career directing dark comedies.
bio: Bobcat Goldthwait is an American comedian, actor and filmmaker known for a confrontational stand-up persona delivered in a raspy, high-pitched voice. He rose to prominence in the 1980s through specials like An Evening with Bobcat Goldthwait: Share the Warmth and supporting roles in the Police Academy films, later building a respected career directing dark comedies.

timeline.ev: Special An Evening with Bobcat Goldthwait: Share the Warmth
Directs and stars in Shakes the Clown

accolades: Acclaimed director of dark comedies including Worlds Greatest Dad and God Bless America

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: Only one embeddable official clip found: a 1994 Just For Laughs stand-up set. His 1980s specials (Share the Warmth, Is He Like That All the Time?) and his Letterman/Conan/Comic Relief appearances circulate only as fan re-rips (jerkylfish, Laugh Trax, A Blast from the Past, etc.) and were rejected. A Comedy Central Stand-Up 'Police Brutality' clip exists on the official channel but no verifiable watch ID could be confirmed.

bits.yt_title: Bobcat Goldthwait Wants To Be Dave's Friend | Letterman
